title: Interactive Study Companion
description: Question bank and reference links live together in one grade file so the static app can load everything with one fetch.

chapters.title: New Testament 2: Epistles of St. Paul
St. Mary - The Handmaid of God
History of the Syriac Orthodox Church

questions.section: Study Guide - Shy Thomas, Norcross, GA
questions.question: When did Jesus establish the Holy Qurbono as the New Testament sacrifice? What was replaced?
questions.answer: On the day of the Last Supper. Animal sacrifice of the Old Testament.

questions.section: Study Guide - Shy Thomas, Norcross, GA
questions.question: What does the Holy Qurbono commemorate?
questions.answer: Birth, public ministry, death, resurrection, and Second Coming of Jesus Christ.

questions.section: Study Guide - Shy Thomas, Norcross, GA
questions.question: What does the word 'Qurbono' mean?

questions.section: Study Guide - Shy Thomas, Norcross, GA
questions.question: What is another name for Holy Qurbono/Holy Communion?

questions.section: Study Guide - Shy Thomas, Norcross, GA
questions.question: Holy Qurbono is the '________'

questions.section: Study Guide - Shy Thomas, Norcross, GA
questions.question: What are the 4 components of the Holy Qurbono?
questions.answer: The celebrant, The Sacramental items, Book of Holy Liturgy (Anaphora/Qurbono Taksa), and Recipient (congregation).

questions.section: Study Guide - Shy Thomas, Norcross, GA
questions.question: Who is the celebrant and who is the ambassador?
questions.answer: God is the celebrant, and the Prelate (Patriarch/Catholicose/bishop) or priest is the ambassador.

questions.section: Study Guide - Shy Thomas, Norcross, GA
questions.question: What are the primary Sacramental items for the holy Qurbono?
questions.answer: Leavened bread and wine mixed with water.

questions.section: Study Guide - Shy Thomas, Norcross, GA
questions.question: What are the official terms for the Book/Rite of the Holy Qurbono?

questions.section: Study Guide - Shy Thomas, Norcross, GA
questions.question: How many different Taksas are there in existence?

questions.section: Study Guide - Shy Thomas, Norcross, GA
questions.question: The first church in Christianity is also known as _________. What occurred here?
questions.answer: Upper Room of St. Mark. The Last Supper occurred here.

questions.section: Study Guide - Shy Thomas, Norcross, GA
questions.question: Who consecrates a church building? What is it anointed with?
questions.answer: A bishop. It is anointed with Holy Chrism (Mooron).
